item.title: Version 1.08
item.description:
New

  • Added Exa as a web search provider alongside Tavily.
  • Added a new Web Search Provider setting so you can choose between Tavily and Exa.
  • Added Exa-specific search modes: Auto, Fast, Instant, Deep Lite, and Deep.
  • Added Fireworks AI as a chat provider, including default Fireworks models and provider branding.
  • Added support/community links in the app for Discord and contributing to Warden.

Improved

  • Web search is now provider-agnostic, making /search, /web, and /google work through the selected search provider.
  • Web search API keys are stored separately per provider in Keychain.
  • Search failures now use clearer generic "Web Search" error messages instead of Tavily-specific wording.
  • Fireworks model metadata support was added for pricing, context, capabilities, and reasoning metadata where available.
  • Fireworks models now participate in reasoning-effort controls when supported.

Community

  • Added an optional startup prompt for supporting Warden.
  • Added an optional startup prompt for joining the Warden Discord.
  • Both prompts can be dismissed or suppressed.

Full diff: https://github.com/SidhuK/WardenApp/compare/v1.07...main

item.title: Version 1.07
item.description:
New

  • Added a Quick Chat Clipboard Context toggle in General Settings to control whether Quick Chat uses clipboard text as prompt context.

Improved

  • Refactored Quick Chat clipboard handling into a testable helper with unit coverage.

item.title: Version 1.05
item.description:
Improved

  • Settings UI cleaned up and made more native.
  • Code fixes and improvements to the updater.
  • Changed update manager for improved reliability.

item.title: Version 1.04
item.description:
Improved

  • Migrated keychain storage from legacy macai bundle to Warden bundle (karatsidhu.WardenAI).
  • Existing API tokens are automatically migrated on first launch.
  • Updated MCP SDK to 0.12.0, fixing NetworkTransport data race issues.

Maintenance

  • Updated test bundle identifiers to match Warden naming.
  • Updated MCP tool content handling for new SDK API.

item.title: Version 1.03
item.description:
New

  • Added support for the Pollinations API provider.
  • Added Pollinations logo assets with 1x/2x/3x SVG sizing.

Improved

  • Improved Gemini reasoning parameter handling when reasoning is disabled.
  • Expanded provider model metadata coverage and storage helpers.

Maintenance

  • Updated Sparkle appcast metadata for the v1.03 distribution package.

item.title: Version 1.02
item.description:
New

  • Added Codex App Server as a provider.
  • Added ChatGPT OAuth sign-in flow for Codex.
  • Added Codex usage/rate-limit visibility in API service settings.
  • Added Codex thread persistence support for better conversation continuity.

Improved

  • Improved reasoning effort controls (including better provider/model handling).
  • Improved Codex model metadata/fetch flows and initialization paths.
  • Refined Codex transport and auth lifecycle behavior for better reliability.

Fixed

  • Fixed chat composer focus behavior so input reliably regains focus.
  • Fixed Enter-to-send handling (while preserving Shift+Enter for newline).
  • Fixed Codex-related issues from review: transport edge cases, auth task lifecycle, and thread persistence consistency.

Security & Distribution

  • The app is now signed with an Apple Developer signature.
  • The app is now Apple notarized.
  • Previous builds were not notarized.

item.title: Version 1.01
item.description:
Bug Fixes

  • Fixed chat composer focus behavior so the input regains focus automatically after a model response finishes.
  • Fixed Enter-key submission in the chat input (Shift+Enter still inserts a newline), including OpenAI-compatible provider flows.
  • Improves keyboard-only chat loop reliability on macOS (including Sequoia).

item.title: Version 1.0
item.description:
New

  • OpenRouter models are now sub-categorized by provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, xAI, ZAI, and more)
  • Option to group or ungroup chats by date in the sidebar
  • Metadata and properties are now shown for most models (credit: LiteLLM on GitHub)

Improvements

  • Model Selector dropdown now has tabs, improved organization, and faster performance
  • Quick Chat improvements and a more robust experience
  • Cleaner sidebar with more chats visible
  • UI improvements to the sidebar and chat area
  • Projects UI simplifications and more native macOS touches

Maintenance

  • Code quality improvements

item.title: Version 0.9.9
item.description:
Improvements

  • UI code improvements and formatting fixes
  • Improved attachment handling across providers with off-main-actor I/O
  • Fixed path traversal and Core Data access issues for attachments
  • Fixed non-streaming fallback chain

Infrastructure

  • Added GitHub Actions release workflow
  • Commit-based changelog generation

item.title: Version 0.9.6
item.description:
New Features

  • Added Reasoning Effort support - Low, Medium, High (and xHigh for OpenAI models)

Improvements

  • Faster loading for model selector popover
  • UI: Cleaner sidebar with new thread button moved to top
  • UI: More compact sidebar layout
  • Preferences: Better grouping of settings
  • Update dialog: Removed extra confirmation dialog, now shows only the native update dialog

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed crash that could occur when changing model providers

item.title: Version 0.9.5
item.description:
New Features

  • Custom OpenAI-compatible API endpoints
  • New Tools tab in Preferences

Improvements

  • MCP Tools integration improvements in the message input
  • Chat list selection and delete handling refinements
  • UI polish across message input, branch indicator, and entity list layout

Docs

  • Updated README and screenshots
  • Added setup guide for OpenRouter API key integration
  • Expanded architecture documentation

item.title: Version 0.9.4
item.description:
New Features

  • Chat Editing — Edit your previously sent messages with character count and adjustable font size
  • Menu Bar Quick Access (Beta) — New menu bar icon for instant AI access from anywhere
  • Arrow Key Navigation — Use arrow keys to navigate between chats in the sidebar

UI Improvements

  • Settings Redesign — Cleaner, more native and minimal settings UI
  • Sidebar Enhancements — Improved hover effects, swipe actions, and visual polish
  • Projects View — Enhanced data loading and improved visual hierarchy
  • Provider Logos — Inverted icon rendering for better readability in dark mode
  • Quick Chat — Expanded functionality with web search and dynamic height adjustment
  • Better Onboarding — Step-based navigation with visual indicators and keyboard shortcuts

Bug Fixes & Improvements

  • Fixed scrolling issues for AI assistant responses
  • Improved selection handling and alert presentation in chat list
  • Code readability improvements and UI refactoring

item.title: Version 0.9.3
item.description:
• Added Homebrew Cask support and automation script for easier installations
  • Major refactor of models and UI components for improved performance and maintainability
  • Enhanced keyboard shortcut handling and attachment management
  • Improved app icon visibility with increased scale
  • Fixed SSEStreamParser compilation issues
  • Updated documentation with Homebrew installation instructions

item.title: Version 0.9.2
item.description:
• Added update check dialog that shows progress and "You're up to date" message
  • Fixed settings window not changing theme when switching light/dark mode
  • Window size now persists between app launches, with a smaller default size
  • Fixed project list not showing archived projects
  • UI improvements to the sidebar and how chats inside projects are displayed
  • Message Input box improvements to the UI

item.title: Version 0.9.1
item.description:
⚡ Performance

  • Smoother scrolling — Chat messages now use stable identities
  • Faster chat list — Sidebar no longer creates heavy objects for every row
  • Smarter code highlighting — Code blocks skip redundant re-highlighting
  • Faster search — Chat search now uses database-level queries
  • Less CPU usage — Messages array is now cached
  • Faster streaming — Responses now appear 4x faster (50ms vs 200ms)
  • Smarter parsing — New incremental parser only processes new text
  • App Icon Update — New icons for dark, light, and liquid glass modes

📂 Projects

  • Faster loading — Projects tab now loads instantly
  • UI Overhaul — Modern interface with recent chats and all chats list
  • Smoother "Move to Project" — Moving chats is now instant
  • Fixed data loss — Creating custom projects no longer wipes descriptions

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed Settings crash
  • Model temperature now saved correctly (1.0 by default)

item.title: Version 0.9
item.description:
• Faster, smoother streaming replies
  • Better performance in large chats
  • Cleaner markdown handling
  • Improved stability and cancellation behavior
  • Smarter buffering for UI responsiveness
  • More resilient streaming parsing
  • Safer attachment handling
  • Better logging and diagnostics
  • Virtual message list for large conversations

item.title: Version 0.8
item.description:
• Full MCP agent support with tool calling
  • MCP agent management in Preferences
  • Agent selection in chat interface
  • Tool call progress view and management UI
  • Conversation branching with custom AI selection
  • Web search results persistence and citations overhaul
  • Multi-agent mode enhancements
  • Fresh UI improvements across message cells and settings
  • Refactored API handlers with better error handling

item.title: Version 0.7
item.description:
• Smart model icons (reasoning/vision) from API metadata
  • Real pricing information with input/output rates
  • Automatic hourly update checks
  • Web search with real-time progress and citations
  • Persona customization
  • Visual improvements to message bubbles
  • Model selector optimization
  • Code cleanup and performance improvements
